Back to Opulent

Cosrx peptide eye cream

Old price New price R390.00

A fragrance that conjures the scent of amber with a constellation of Frankincense, Labdanum and Vanilla Bean, enlivened by a radical streak of Cardamom that lends a fresh, near-citrus spice.

New addition

Cosrx peptide eye cream

Cardamom, Vanilla Bean, Frankincense

One size only
Selected 50 mL
Old price New price R390.00
, 1 of 1
PDP Tabs

A fragrance that conjures the scent of amber with a constellation of Frankincense, Labdanum and Vanilla Bean, enlivened by a radical streak of Cardamom that lends a fresh, near-citrus spice.

Aroma: Ambery, woody, spicy
Suited to: All genders; astrophiles, gemmologists, sommeliers
Key ingredients: Cardamom, Vanilla Bean, Frankincense
Alcohol, Parfum, Water (Aqua), Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Limonene, Pinene, Linalool, Acetyl Cedrene, Vanillin, Citronellol, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Trimethylcyclopentenyl Methylisopentenol, Coumarin, Geraniol, Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Bark Oil, Terpineol, Cinnamal, Beta-Caryophyllene, Terpinolene, Geranyl Acetate, Citral, Alpha-Terpinene, Rose Ketones, Carvone, Eugenol, Camphor.

This ingredient list is subject to change. Prior to use, please refer to the product label for the most accurate information.

All Anantara products are vegan. We only use ingredients with a proven record of safety, efficacy and sustainability.

Many of our product packaging components are recyclable. We recommend disassembling (in this case removing the pump and cap) and sorting the components. The bottle may be recycled, while the pump and cap should be placed in the waste bin. Paper packaging is made from FSC® certified stock. Please remove this component and place in the recycling bin.

A fragrance that conjures the scent of amber with a constellation of Frankincense, Labdanum and Vanilla Bean, enlivened by a radical streak of Cardamom that lends a fresh, near-citrus spice.

Aroma: Ambery, woody, spicy
Suited to: All genders; astrophiles, gemmologists, sommeliers
Key ingredients: Cardamom, Vanilla Bean, Frankincense

Alcohol, Parfum, Water (Aqua), Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Limonene, Pinene, Linalool, Acetyl Cedrene, Vanillin, Citronellol, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Trimethylcyclopentenyl Methylisopentenol, Coumarin, Geraniol, Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Bark Oil, Terpineol, Cinnamal, Beta-Caryophyllene, Terpinolene, Geranyl Acetate, Citral, Alpha-Terpinene, Rose Ketones, Carvone, Eugenol, Camphor.

This ingredient list is subject to change. Prior to use, please refer to the product label for the most accurate information.

All Anantara products are vegan. We only use ingredients with a proven record of safety, efficacy and sustainability.

Many of our product packaging components are recyclable. We recommend disassembling (in this case removing the pump and cap) and sorting the components. The bottle may be recycled, while the pump and cap should be placed in the waste bin. Paper packaging is made from FSC® certified stock. Please remove this component and place in the recycling bin.

PDP How to use

How to use

Apply as desired to wrists and neck. Throughout the day, the aromatic profile will develop, following a unique trajectory from sizzling spice to ambery warmth. Layer with complementary Anantara hand and body care formulations to enhance the aroma.

Top notes

Cardamom, Bergamot, Elemi

Middle notes

Frankincense, Labdanum, Cypriol Heart

Base notes

Vanilla Bean, Cinnamon, Cypriol Heart

The aroma

A compelling constellation

Glowing amber

A unique ‘fabulist accord’ of Frankincense, Labdanum and Vanilla Bean conjures the imagined scent of Amber, making the unscented, aromatic.

Sizzling Cardamom

A radical streak of Cardamom soars from incandescent spice in the opening notes, to glimmering warmth in the base.

PDP Customer Service Banner
PDP Video Fullscreen Flowplayer
A star, steady in the sky / Thought it was the only light / Solitary in its glow / But then fire cut the dark / Disrupting certainties / A glimmer of possibility / And so it took the chance / Ignited with an amber glow / Illuminating the unexplored / Charting its own course / Seeking its own story / Propelled by a question: / Shall we trust in the unknown? / Above Us, Steorra. Anantara.
A star, steady in the sky / Thought it was the only light / Solitary in its glow / But then fire cut the dark / Disrupting certainties / A glimmer of possibility / And so it took the chance / Ignited with an amber glow / Illuminating the unexplored / Charting its own course / Seeking its own story / Propelled by a question: / Shall we trust in the unknown? / Above Us, Steorra. Anantara.
